faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Goa Graduate Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Graduate Apprentice posts at IIT Goa is scheduled for 30th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Graduate Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all Graduate Apprentice posts at IIT Goa is 18 years. There is no upper age limit specified in the provided information.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Graduate Apprentice positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Graduate Apprentice positions will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 12,300. This applies to both Engineering and General streams.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Graduate Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies for the Graduate Apprentice posts at IIT Goa. These are divided into two categories: Graduate (Engineering Stream) with 2 vacancies and Graduate (General Stream) with 10 vacancies.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Graduate Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: For the Engineering Stream, a Bachelor's Degree in Electrical Engineering or Electronics & Communications Engineering is required. For the General Stream, a Bachelor's Degree in Arts, Commerce, Science, Business Administration, Computer Applications, Management Science, or Business Studies is needed.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the IIT Goa Graduate Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for the Graduate Apprentice recruitment at IIT Goa. This applies to all categories, including General, OBC, SC, and ST candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Graduate Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Graduate Apprentice posts at IIT Goa will involve an assessment of Academic Merit, followed by a Personal Interaction and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and recent passport-size photographs. A duly filled application form may also be required.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for IIT Goa Graduate Apprentice posts going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Indian Institute of Technology Goa, Ponda, Goa - 403401. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for the exact venue details and reporting time.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: The Graduate Apprentice positions at IIT Goa are on a contract basis. Therefore, these are not permanent government jobs but rather apprenticeship opportunities.
